  "summary": "This chunk contains four necromantic rituals from the Munich Handbook (CLM 849): (1) a ritual to cause loss of mental faculties by invoking ten demons including Mirael, Oreoth, and Astaroth; (2) a love-drawing ritual invoking six 'hot' spirits (Tubal, Cupido, etc.) and using an image inscribed with demonic names; (3) a ritual for gaining dignity/honor involving engraved stones and invoked spirits like Dyacom and Pumeon; and (4) a hatred-inducing rite employing paired stones inscribed with mutually hostile demon names such as Cartutay and Puzanil. The rituals feature protective circles, candles, images, amulets, and complex conjurations blending Christian invocations with demonic hierarchies.",
  "key_passages": [
    "Coniuro vos decem demones malignos, videlicet Oreoth, Pinen, Ocel, Tryboy, Noryoth, Belferith, Camoy, Astaroth, Sobronoy, Sismael...",
    "Formo talem, N., filiam talis, quam habere desidero, nomine istorum sex spirituum calidorum, videlicet Tubal, Sathan, Reuces, Cupido, Afalion, Duliatus...",
    "Ego, talis, exorzizo te, ymaginem, nomine talis formatam, per inseparabilem vnicam et indiuiduam trinitatem...",
    "Coniuro vos spiritus inimicissimos, per eterni dei gloriam, quod inter talem et talem...quantum odium inter vos est, tantum inter ipsos seminetis..."
  ]
}
